tasks.title: Project Infrastructure Setup
tasks.description: Initialize the project structure following atomic design principles with proper Python packaging and development environment configuration
tasks.details: Create the directory structure under src/mcp_server_cheap_llm/ with core/, services/, server/, and utils/ directories. Setup pyproject.toml with proper dependencies (pydantic, fastapi, llama-cpp-python, openai, google-generativeai). Configure pixi for environment management. Implement basic __init__.py files and package structure. Setup .gitignore for Python projects including .taskmaster/, .mcp.json, and other development artifacts.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for package imports, directory structure validation, and dependency resolution. Integration tests for pixi environment setup and package installation.

subtasks.title: Setup Python Package Structure with Tests
subtasks.description: Create the core Python package structure under src/mcp_server_cheap_llm/ with proper __init__.py files and establish testing framework
subtasks.details: RED: Write test_package_structure.py to verify package imports work correctly. GREEN: Create src/mcp_server_cheap_llm/__init__.py with version info, core/__init__.py, services/__init__.py, server/__init__.py, utils/__init__.py. Create tests/ directory with __init__.py and conftest.py. REFACTOR: Ensure clean imports and package metadata. QUALITY: Run pixi run test && pixi run ruff check --select=F,E9 && eval "$(pixi shell-hook -e dev)" && pre-commit run --all-files. COMMIT: 'feat: initialize Python package structure with test framework'. PUSH: Push to remote. VERIFY: Check CI passes and repository is clean.
subtasks.testStrategy: Write tests to verify package imports, version accessibility, and module structure before implementation

GREEN: Create pixi.toml with Python 3.11+, define dev environment with pytest, ruff, mypy, pre-commit. Configure pixi.lock generation. REFACTOR: Optimize dependency versions and environment configuration. PUSH: Push to remote. VERIFY: Check CI passes with pixi environment.

GREEN: Create pyproject.toml with project metadata, dependencies for mcp, pydantic>=2.0, fastapi, openai, google-generativeai, llama-cpp-python. Configure build system with hatchling. GREEN: Create comprehensive .gitignore for Python (__pycache__, .pytest_cache, .mypy_cache, .taskmaster/, .mcp.json, .env*). Setup .pre-commit-config.yaml with ruff, mypy, pytest hooks. Configure git hooks. REFACTOR: Organize .gitignore by category, optimize pre-commit performance. subtasks.title: Validate Complete Infrastructure Setup
subtasks.description: Run comprehensive integration tests to ensure all infrastructure components work together correctly
subtasks.details: RED: Write test_integration.py to verify complete development workflow (install, test, lint, format, pre-commit). GREEN: Implement integration test suite that validates package structure, environment setup, dependency resolution, and development tools. Create smoke tests for basic functionality. REFACTOR: Consolidate test utilities, optimize test performance. tasks.title: Setup Core Configuration Management System
tasks.description: Implement robust configuration management with validation for API keys, provider settings, and runtime parameters
tasks.details: Create config.py with Pydantic models for all configuration options. Support environment variables, JSON/YAML/TOML files. Implement secure API key handling with encryption at rest. Include validation for all provider configurations (Gemini, OpenAI, LLaMA paths). Create ConfigManager class with methods for loading, validating, and updating configurations. Add configuration schema validation and error handling for missing or invalid keys.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for configuration loading from different sources, validation of required fields, encryption/decryption of API keys, and error handling for invalid configurations. Integration tests for loading from actual config files.

subtasks.title: Setup TDD Environment and Basic Configuration Models
subtasks.description: Create initial test structure and basic Pydantic models for configuration management with failing tests
subtasks.details: RED: Write failing tests for basic ConfigModel, APIKeyConfig, and ProviderConfig Pydantic models in tests/unit/test_config.py. Test basic validation, required fields, and model instantiation. GREEN: Create src/mcp_server_cheap_llm/utils/config.py with minimal Pydantic models to pass tests. REFACTOR: Enhance models with proper typing, docstrings, and validation. QUALITY: Run pixi run test && pixi run ruff check --select=F,E9 && eval "$(pixi shell-hook -e dev)" && pre-commit run --all-files. COMMIT: 'feat: basic configuration models with TDD foundation'. PUSH: Push to remote. VERIFY: Check CI passes and repository is clean.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for Pydantic model validation, field requirements, and basic instantiation scenarios. Property-based testing for edge cases.

subtasks.description: Implement environment variable loading with comprehensive validation and type conversion
subtasks.details: RED: Write failing tests for environment variable loading, type conversion, default values, and validation errors in tests/unit/test_config_env.py. Test scenarios: missing required vars, invalid formats, type mismatches. GREEN: Implement EnvironmentLoader class with get_api_key(), get_server_config() methods in utils/config.py. REFACTOR: Add error handling, logging, and clean architecture. QUALITY: Run pixi run test && pixi run ruff check --select=F,E9 && eval "$(pixi shell-hook -e dev)" && pre-commit run --all-files. COMMIT: 'feat: environment variable loading with validation'. PUSH: Push to remote. VERIFY: Check CI passes and repository is clean.

subtasks.details: RED: Write failing tests for API key encryption/decryption, validation, and secure storage in tests/unit/test_config_security.py. Test multiple providers (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic). GREEN: Implement APIKeyManager class with cryptography library for encryption in utils/config.py. REFACTOR: Add key rotation, validation, and secure memory handling. subtasks.details: RED: Write failing tests for complete configuration loading from files (JSON, YAML, TOML), environment override precedence, and validation pipeline in tests/integration/test_config_integration.py. tasks.title: Implement Logging and Error Handling Infrastructure
tasks.description: Create comprehensive logging system with structured logging and centralized error handling
tasks.details: Build logging.py with structured logging using Python's logging module. Implement different log levels (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR). Create custom error classes in errors.py for different failure scenarios (APIError, QuotaExceededError, ValidationError). Add request/response logging with sanitization for sensitive data. Include performance metrics logging and audit trail for security events. Implement log rotation and filtering capabilities.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for log message formatting, error class hierarchy, and sanitization functions. Integration tests for logging in different scenarios and verification of log output structure.

subtasks.description: Create the core logging infrastructure with structured formatting, request correlation IDs, and configurable log levels
subtasks.details: RED: Write failing tests for StructuredLogger class with JSON formatting, correlation ID generation, and context propagation in tests/unit/test_logging.py. Test log level filtering, thread safety, and log output format. GREEN: Implement StructuredLogger and LogContext classes in utils/logging.py with proper JSON formatting and correlation ID management. REFACTOR: Add configuration loading, thread-safe context management, and performance optimization. PUSH: Push to remote. VERIFY: Check CI passes with logging tests.

tasks.title: Define Core Data Models and Validation
tasks.description: Create Pydantic models for all core data structures used throughout the system
tasks.details: Implement models.py with Pydantic v2 models for: LLMRequest (prompt, parameters, provider_hint), LLMResponse (content, metadata, cost), ProviderConfig (api_keys, limits, endpoints), CacheEntry (key, value, ttl, created_at), BatchRequest (requests, priority, deadline), UsageMetrics (provider, tokens, cost, timestamp). Add comprehensive validation rules, custom validators, and serialization methods. Include model inheritance for provider-specific configurations.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for model validation, serialization/deserialization, custom validators, and edge cases. Property-based testing for model invariants and validation rules.

tasks.title: Create Abstract Provider Interface Architecture
tasks.description: Design and implement the abstract base class and interface for all LLM providers
tasks.details: Build providers.py with abstract base class LLMProvider defining standard interface: generate(request), validate_config(), get_usage(), check_quota(), estimate_cost(). Include async support for concurrent requests. Define provider capabilities (streaming, batch, embeddings). Add provider metadata (cost_per_token, rate_limits, model_variants). Implement provider registration system and factory pattern for dynamic provider loading. Include circuit breaker pattern for handling provider failures.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for abstract interface compliance, provider registration, and factory methods. Mock implementations to verify interface contracts and error handling patterns.

tasks.title: Implement Prompt Complexity Analysis System
tasks.description: Create intelligent routing algorithm that analyzes prompt complexity and determines optimal provider selection
tasks.details: Build complexity analyzer in routing module with scoring algorithm (0-10 scale) based on: prompt length, technical keywords, code presence, mathematical expressions, language complexity, context requirements. Implement routing rules: 0-3 → Gemini free tier, 3-5 → batch API/cached, 5-7 → premium models, 7-10 → complex tasks. Add machine learning capability for improving routing decisions over time. Include fallback chains and provider health checking. Create routing decision logging for optimization.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for complexity scoring with known prompts, routing decision logic, and fallback mechanisms. Integration tests with mock providers to verify routing behavior under different scenarios.

tasks.title: Integrate Google Gemini CLI Provider
tasks.description: Google Gemini integration has been successfully implemented with comprehensive quality validation and is fully functional for MCP server integration
tasks.details: ✅ COMPLETED: Gemini provider integration is fully operational with all quality gates passing. Implementation includes: gemini_service.py with complete LLMProvider interface implementation using google-generativeai library. Quota tracking system for 1000 requests/day free tier with usage monitoring and 80% quota warnings. Request retry logic with exponential backoff and comprehensive error handling. Full support for Gemini-specific parameters (temperature, top_p, top_k). Streaming response support and safety settings configuration. All critical type errors resolved and Pydantic v2 migration completed. Latest Gemini CLI documentation alignment confirmed with Gemini 2.5 Pro support, 1M token context window, and multimodal capabilities. Complete test coverage with 316 passing tests and zero critical lint violations.
tasks.testStrategy: ✅ COMPLETED: All tests passing (316/316). Comprehensive test coverage includes unit tests for API integration, quota tracking, retry logic, parameter handling, and Pydantic v2 compatibility. Integration tests verified with actual Gemini API patterns. Quality validation includes type checking (0 errors), lint checks (all critical violations resolved), and structured logging compatibility.

tasks.title: Integrate OpenAI API with Batch Processing
tasks.description: Implement OpenAI provider with support for both real-time and batch API calls for cost optimization
tasks.details: Create codex_service.py implementing OpenAI integration with openai library. Support GPT-4o-mini and Codex models. Implement batch API integration for 50% cost savings on non-urgent requests. Add request queuing system with priority handling. Include streaming response support and function calling capabilities. Implement token counting and cost estimation. Add rate limiting and concurrent request management. Include batch job status monitoring and result retrieval.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for API integration, batch processing, cost calculation, and rate limiting. Integration tests with OpenAI API including batch job lifecycle and streaming responses.

tasks.title: Implement Local LLaMA Model Support
tasks.description: Add local LLaMA model integration for offline capability and cost-free processing
tasks.details: Create llama_service.py using llama-cpp-python for local model execution. Implement model loading and management with configurable model paths. Add GPU acceleration support (CUDA/Metal) when available. Implement context window management and memory optimization. Add model switching capabilities for different use cases. Include performance monitoring and resource usage tracking. Support for quantized models and custom model formats. Add model download and installation utilities.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for model loading, context management, and parameter handling. Integration tests with actual model files and performance benchmarking across different hardware configurations.

tasks.title: Build Comprehensive Caching System
tasks.description: Implement aggressive caching with SHA256 keys, TTL management, and cache warming for cost reduction
tasks.details: Create cache_service.py with content-based caching using SHA256(prompt + provider + parameters) as keys. Implement TTL management with configurable expiration policies. Add cache warming for common queries and LRU eviction policy. Support multiple cache backends (memory, Redis, file-based). Include cache hit rate monitoring targeting 40%+ hit rate. Add cache invalidation strategies and cache size management. Implement cache persistence and restoration across restarts.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for key generation, TTL management, eviction policies, and cache operations. Integration tests for different cache backends and performance testing for cache hit rates.

tasks.title: Create Provider Manager and Usage Tracking
tasks.description: Implement centralized provider management with real-time usage monitoring and quota tracking
tasks.details: Build provider_manager.py coordinating all providers with health checking and failover logic. Implement usage tracking for tokens, requests, and costs per provider. Add quota monitoring with warning thresholds (80%, 90%, 95%). Create usage analytics with historical data and trend analysis. Include cost calculation and budget management. Add provider performance metrics and response time tracking. Implement automatic provider rotation and load balancing.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for provider coordination, usage calculations, and quota management. Integration tests for failover scenarios and usage tracking accuracy across multiple providers.

tasks.title: Implement Batch Processing System
tasks.description: Create intelligent batch processing with request queuing, similarity grouping, and priority management
tasks.details: Create batch_service.py with request queuing system supporting urgent vs non-urgent prioritization. Implement similarity grouping to batch related requests together. Add OpenAI batch API integration for 50% cost savings. Include batch job monitoring and status tracking. Add deadline management and automatic batch submission. Implement batch result processing and client notification. Include batch optimization algorithms and performance metrics.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for queuing logic, similarity detection, and batch optimization. Integration tests for batch job lifecycle and cost savings verification.

tasks.title: Build MCP Server Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the Model Context Protocol server with handlers and middleware for seamless client integration
tasks.details: Create server/handlers.py implementing MCP protocol handlers for text generation, embeddings, and chat completion. Add middleware.py for logging, metrics collection, and request/response transformation. Implement WebSocket and HTTP transport support. Add authentication and authorization middleware. Include request validation and response formatting. Add health check endpoints and monitoring. Implement graceful shutdown and connection management.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for protocol handlers, middleware functions, and transport layers. Integration tests with MCP clients and protocol compliance verification.

subtasks.details: RED: Write failing tests for MiddlewareChain for request/response interception, LoggingMiddleware for structured logging with correlation IDs, MetricsMiddleware for performance monitoring, and ResourceManager for connection pooling in tests/unit/test_middleware.py and tests/integration/test_server_integration.py. tasks.title: Implement Performance Optimization and Monitoring
tasks.description: Add performance monitoring, concurrent request handling, and system optimization for production deployment
tasks.details: Implement concurrent request processing with asyncio and thread pooling. Add performance monitoring with metrics collection (response times, throughput, resource usage). Create connection pooling for provider APIs. Add request queuing and backpressure handling. Implement memory management and garbage collection optimization. Add performance profiling and bottleneck identification. Include system resource monitoring and alerting.
tasks.testStrategy: Performance testing with concurrent requests, load testing for scalability verification, and monitoring system validation. Stress testing for memory usage and resource exhaustion scenarios.

tasks.title: Create Integration Testing Suite and Documentation
tasks.description: Develop comprehensive integration tests and complete documentation for deployment and usage
tasks.details: Create integration test suite covering end-to-end workflows, provider interactions, and MCP client integration. Add API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger specs. Create deployment guides for different environments. Add troubleshooting documentation and FAQ. Include performance benchmarks and optimization guides. Create developer documentation for extending providers. Add configuration examples and best practices guide.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests with real providers and MCP clients, documentation accuracy verification, and deployment testing across different environments.
